company.name: HMJ Global
company.tagline: People-first teams powering hyperscale data centres and pharma manufacturing.
company.summary: HMJ Global is a specialist recruitment partner supporting mission-critical delivery across data centres, critical infrastructure and pharmaceutical manufacturing projects.
services: Recruitment for CSA, MEP, commissioning, project controls, commercial and operations teams
Cross-border mobilisation support across the UK and Europe
Compliance, onboarding, payroll and contractor care
Structured hiring support for operationally sensitive projects
candidateSupport: Interview preparation and role context before each stage
Clearer commercial and site detail before mobilisation
clientSupport: Requirement review within one business day
Support shaping briefs, package scope and mobilisation detail
Compliance, payroll and onboarding support built into delivery
Structured recruitment support for CSA, MEP, commissioning and project controls packages
company.legal: HMJ-Global is a trading name of HMJ-Global Ltd, registered in England and Wales, company number 16029938.

home.summary: The homepage positions HMJ as a people-first recruitment partner for hyperscale data centres and pharma manufacturing, with joined-up recruitment, contractor care and finance control.

about.summary: The About page explains HMJ's mission-critical recruitment model, European mobilisation experience, leadership team and structured operating approach.
highlights: Data centre and pharma delivery focus

candidates.summary: The Candidates page focuses on registration, CV submission, live jobs, weekly pay, cross-border support and a cleaner route from CV to site start.
highlights: Weekly payroll and EU mobility support

clients.summary: The Clients page explains HMJ's hiring support for operationally sensitive projects and encourages visitors to share a requirement, request a proposal or speak to HMJ client services.
highlights: Client services review each requirement within one business day
Support for CSA, MEP, commissioning and project controls
Compliance, payroll and onboarding built into delivery

contact.summary: The Contact and Apply page is the main route for candidate applications, CV submission and general enquiries to the HMJ recruitment team.
highlights: Secure CV upload and contact capture

jobs.summary: The Jobs page presents live roles across data centre builds, commissioning, pharma cleanrooms and critical infrastructure, with clear sector fit, employment type and project signals.
highlights: Register CV for similar starts if a role is not quite right
Direct contact route when a brief needs discussion

faqs.question: What does HMJ Global do?
faqs.answer: HMJ Global is a specialist recruitment partner supporting data centre, critical infrastructure and pharmaceutical manufacturing projects across the UK and Europe, with recruitment, mobilisation, compliance, payroll and contractor care built into the delivery model.

faqs.question: How do I register with HMJ?
faqs.answer: The quickest route is the candidate registration page where visitors can upload a CV or submit their profile, or they can apply directly through the contact/apply route if they already have a role in mind.

faqs.question: Can HMJ help us hire staff?
faqs.answer: Yes. HMJ supports clients with recruitment for operationally sensitive projects across data centres, commissioning, project controls, CSA, MEP and related disciplines, and the clients page is the best route to share a requirement or request a proposal.

faqs.question: Which sectors does HMJ recruit for?
faqs.answer: HMJ focuses on hyperscale data centres, critical infrastructure, substations and power, commissioning, project controls, and pharmaceutical manufacturing and cleanroom environments.
